posts.text: Should there be a statute of limitations on the bodies you've caught?🤔
Good morning USAAAAAAA! Peace to the planet it’s Thursdayyyy! Tap into the world’s dangerous morning show! Breakfastclubonline.com/list…

🗣️ @rajahcaruth_  will be live on The Breakfast Club  promoting his upcoming  @NASCAR  race at Darlington Raceway on Saturday, March 21st at 5:30 PM ET as @BlackEffectPods  Network will serve as the primary partner👏 ! Set your alarms ⏰ and Listen live Tomorrow and➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

Donkey of the Day goes to Cleveland, OH the city and the MF crew, for not caring about the 70-ton meteor that hit their soil 😳. Y’all are really overstimulated by the world, huh? Y’all just don’t care. Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

Within @anitakopacz’s book series, she breaks down the concept of the 'Sacred Trinity' and how it mirrors  “Holy Trinity” . Tap in as she gives us a snippet of what’s to come as she continues to finish Book Three.
➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🚨 Author @anitakopacz’s journey to creating the series 'Daughter of Three Waters' is like no other! Anita explains why the spiritual elements in her storytelling are important and how the stories she’s retelling are very similar to Ryan Coogler’s 'Sinners'. ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🚨 Ray J turns up after he saw the video clip of Shyne and Ma$e talking about their previous connection with Brandy and Ray J DID NOT feel that at all! 😡 @lorenlorosa has the latest updates with @rayj.

Video

🚨 Ray J turns up after he saw the video clip of Shyne and Ma$e talking about their previous connection with Brandy and Ray J DID NOT feel that at all! 😡 @lorenlorosa has the latest updates with @rayj.

Video

🚨 Producer/artist @mikewillmadeit’s hard drive with all his music at the time was part of a smash-and-grab in ATL 😳, but how did he recover from such a loss? ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

💕 Claressa Shields drops an R&B love song for her man, her man, her man Papoose! @jesshilarious_official & @cthagod are dropping 💣s for this record! Tap in to the latest with @lorenlorosa.

Video

🚨 @mikewillmadeit dives into his relationship with Gucci and explains how his work ethic made him his favorite artist to work with and how he later learned that level of work ethic is not the norm.
➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🗣️ 🎙️ @anitakopacz will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting her paperback release of  ’The Wind On Her Tongue’ 📕! Listen live on The Breakfast Club and Set your alarms ⏰ ➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

🗣️🎙️ @MikeWiLLMadeIt will be on The Breakfast Club tomorrow promoting his upcoming album ‘The Rest’ out on 3/20! Listen live on The Breakfast Club and set your alarms ⏰➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

Ma$e & Shyne sit down and get real in a recent interview, reflecting on dating the same woman (Brandy 👀), opening up about the Diddy accusations, and calling out the lack of accountability from those around him that led to his ultimate demise.🤔
 Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa!

Video

Ma$e & Shyne sit down and get real in a recent interview, reflecting on dating the same woman (Brandy 👀), opening up about the Diddy accusations, and calling out the lack of accountability from those around him that led to his ultimate demise.
🤔 Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa!

Video

Another Florida man is in the news and gets Donkey of the Day for firing off his hammer over a non-working karaoke machine… Seriously, what’s in y’all’s water? 🥲 Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

🚨 @robinthicke  opens up on how there were certain moments of grief and loss in his life that called him to have gratitude and the inspiration that can grow out of pain. ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam  on @netflix

Video

🚨 @ripmicheals came through to promote his upcoming comedy show, 'April Fools Comedy Jam,' going down April 4th, but how is his health, considering his heart is functioning at 18%?

Video

🚨 @robinthicke  & @DiRealShaggy  came through to promote their new song “Looking Lovely,” and Robin breaks down trying to make “Black music” and how he and @direalshaggy managed to blend cultures on their new track!

Video

After Teyana Taylor had to defend herself against an overly aggressive security guard, the Oscars have since spoken out, sharing their support and apologizing for what occurred and hopefully this keeps Teyana in high spirits during her amazing season! Tap into the latest with @lorenlorosa 🏆
